creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
marcus@FreeBSD.org writes:

> State-Changed-From-To: patched->closed
> State-Changed-By: marcus
> State-Changed-When: Tue Dec 27 01:26:58 UTC 2011
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Fixed in 2.13.8.

I think you've missed LICENSE_FILE_FOO and LICENSE_GROUPS_FOO. Not sure
why LICENSE_DISTFILES (and LICENSE_DISTFILES_FOO) is ignored, it's part
of "variables provided to ports" in bsd.licenses.mk.
